title: All Risks
definition: Provides an organization cover against accidental physical loss or damage to specified items as a result of any cause which is not specifically excluded from the policy. Who is this product for? It's suitable for businesses with fixed and movable work property.
benefits: The cover includes loss or damage from theft, fire, and accidental damage including riot and strike. It is important that the insured lists the items to be covered and their respective values/sum insured.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
